content: The line "For a long time, I went to bed early" is the famous opening sentence of Marcel Proust's novel "Swann's Way", the first volume of his monumental work "In Search of Lost Time".
raw_content: The line "For a long time, I went to bed early" is the famous opening sentence of Marcel Proust's novel "Swann's Way", the first volume of his monumental work "In Search of Lost Time".
